results.title: World Cup: They’ve an array of talent – Benitez names 4 favourites to win trophy
results.description: Former Real Madrid manager, Rafa Benitez, has named France, Spain and Germany as the four favourites to win the 2026 World Cup this summer. Benitez insisted that France, Spain and England have an array of talent that includes the likes of Ousmane Dembele, Kylian Mbappe, Michael Olise, Pedri, Lamine Yamal, Nico Williams, Rodri, Jude Bellingham, [...] World Cup: They’ve an array of talent – Benitez names 4 favourites to win trophy

results.title: Victor Wembanyama Finds Himself at Center of Bizarre Hotel Controversy With Knicks Fan During NBA Finals
results.description: Victor Wembanyama and the New York Knicks fans are not having the best of times this year. Following Game 4’s historic win for the Knicks, the 22-year-old got hit by eggs from the Knicks fans.

results.title: Jimmy Butler’s 2018 ‘soft’ insult on Karl-Anthony Towns looks awful after Knicks star won NBA Championship
results.description: Jimmy Butler’s old criticism of Karl-Anthony Towns looks very different now that Towns has won the NBA championship Butler is still chasing. The comment came from the messy 2018 Minnesota Timberwolves breakup, when Butler reportedly ripped Towns and Andrew Wiggins during a practice after requesting a trade.

results.title: “We are here for cricket...,” Harmanpreet addresses handshake row ahead of India-Pakistan Women's T20 World Cup clash
results.description: India will open their Women's T20 World Cup 2026 campaign against arch-rivals Pakistan at Edgbaston, Birmingham on Sunday (June 14). On the eve of the game, skipper Harmanpreet Kaur stressed that cricket remains the only topic of discussion between teammates, while also adding her side is fully focused on the game rather than anything beyond it. Kaur acknowledged the immense pressure that comes with an India-Pakistan game but emphasized that embracing and enjoying the moment is the best approach to handling it. During last year's ODI World Cup match, Kaur and her Pakistan counterpart Fatima Sana had snubbed handshake at the toss. When specifically asked about the pre-match greetings in a press conference, Harmanpreet Kaur deflected the chatter by saying, "I think we are here for cricket, and we only talk about cricket, except that we don't talk about anything, and I don't even talk about anything except cricket. Cricket has been our dream from day one, and we only discuss cricket and tomorrow's game, we are only thinking about it." The India captain stated that despite the hype and fan expectations, the team's primary directive is simply to treat it as "another game" and give 100% effort on the field. "It's another game which we are going to play. Definitely, pressure is going to be there. Whenever we play against Pakistan, pressure is going to be there. But at the same time, it's only about how we are going to enjoy that pressure. Because in any international game, pressure is going to be there. It's only about just giving you 100% on that game and enjoying every moment," she added. Having ended their ICC trophy drought by lifting the ODI World Cup last year, the Indian team is looking to build on that success in the Women's T20 World Cup. The Women in Blue have historically been a major force in the T20 World Cup, securing five semi-final appearances and one runners-up finish in 2020. However, they are yet to clinch the coveted title.

results.title: IND v AFG 2026: WATCH – KL Rahul's sublime six draws admiring, viral reaction from Gautam Gambhir during 1st ODI
results.description: India registered a comprehensive seven-wicket victory over Afghanistan in the rain-truncated first ODI at HPCA Stadium, Dharamsala on Saturday (June 13). In a contest which was reduced to 25 overs per side, Afghanistan posted 194/10 on the board thanks to Rahmanullah Gurbaz’s blazing 102 off 51 balls. The hosts replied with 195 for 3 in 22.5 overs. While skipper Shubman Gill remained unbeaten on 84 off 66 balls, Ishan Kishan contributed 22-ball 34 and KL Rahul scored 19-ball 39* during the chase. Rahul hit the winning runs for India, a boundary off Azmatullah Omarzai. Although the wicketkeeper-batter was put at No. 3 in the team sheet, he walked out at his tried-and-tested spot of No. 5 with India needing 53 runs in 7.3 overs. Rahul’s cameo was highly impressive as he hammered 4 fours and 3 sixes. One of his strokes left even head coach Gautam Gambhir in awe. On the last ball of the 22nd over, Rahul played an exquisite lofted cover drive off Zia Ur Rahman Sharifi for a six. The shot was so aesthetically pleasing that it drew a viral reaction from Gambhir. Cameras caught Gambhir turning to batting coach Sitanshu Kotak with a look of pure admiration for the stroke. Here’s the video: Sublime ball-striking ???????? ???? Easy on the eye shots from Captain Shubman Gill and KL Rahul en route to a fine victory ???? Updates ▶️ https://t.co/lCuohEZYAl #TeamIndia | #INDvAFG | @IDFCFIRSTBank | @ShubmanGill | @klrahul pic.twitter.com/hXHuxGC5yL — BCCI (@BCCI) June 13, 2026 KL Rahul has firmly established himself as one of the most reliable and prolific middle-order batters in the world, amassing 969 runs in 22 innings at a staggering average of 74.53 since 2023. His exceptional record features two centuries and five fifties, with no other player across global cricket scoring more runs at a better average from the No. 5 slot during this period.

results.title: IND v AFG 2026: WATCH - Nitish Kumar Reddy briefly pauses press conference to attend mother’s call; video goes viral
results.description: India defeated Afghanistan by seven wickets in a rain-curtailed, 25-overs-per-side opening ODI match at Dharamsala on Saturday (June 13). Nitish Kumar Reddy's steady bowling spell of 2 for 31 proved vital in breaking Afghanistan's momentum after an explosive century from Rahmanullah Gurbaz. The all-rounder dismissed Gurbaz on 51-ball 102, and followed it with the wicket of Mohammad Nabi. After playing a key role in India’s victory, Nitish came to address the press conference at the HPCA Stadium. During his interaction with the reporters, the 23-year-old briefly paused. When his phone rang, Nitish politely apologized, took the call from his mother, and quickly informed her that he would call her back in five minutes. The heartwarming moment went viral, with the BCCI sharing a video of the same on social media channels. Here’s the clip: The post-match presser can wait but a call from Mom simply cannot ???? #TeamIndia | #INDvAFG | @IDFCFIRSTBank | @NKReddy07 pic.twitter.com/23OUBNZvYH — BCCI (@BCCI) June 13, 2026 Coming to the match, Afghanistan posted 194/10 on the board thanks to Rahmanullah Gurbaz’s blazing hundred. The hosts replied with 195 for 3 in 22.5 overs. While skipper Shubman Gill remained unbeaten on 84 off 66 balls, Ishan Kishan contributed 22-ball 34 and KL Rahul scored 19-ball 39* during the chase. With this win, India took a 1-0 lead in the three-match series. The second ODI will be played in Lucknow on June 17.

results.title: Double tornadoes thwart Scotland fans in US with World Cup streams cut off halfway through historic win
results.description: Tornado sirens rang out across Kansas City on Saturday night, with a chilling warning to locals and World Cup tourists alike to shelter in place

results.title: Scotland fans celebrate as first World Cup game in 28 years ends in a win
